text:

I'm testing/discussing this with Erik Greenwald (maintainer). 

One thing I have done so far is renaming the new patch files to 
patch-scrt-apply.c, patch-scrt-apply.h, patch-scrt-objects.c, 
patch-scrt-objects.h, and patch-test-test23.sc.
